topic: pleas ebased on his write fully cinematic text batch long file  we take each 2-3 phrases and convert them in one prompt . so there will be a lot of pr
summary: The project involves breaking down a long cinematic script into approximately 50 individual prompts, each covering 2-3 phrases, to generate a detailed visual narrative using PixVerse. Each prompt will be executed via the `pixverse create image --prompt "..." --model "MODEL_NAME" --resolution "RESOLUTION" --grid "2x2" --json` command. For comparative analysis, every prompt must be run across three distinct models: "nano-banana-2" at 4K resolution, and "Nano Banana Pro" and "GPT2 Medium" both at 2K resolution. This workflow aligns with the "Batch 2x2 Grid Prompt Writing & Generation" skill. The assistant initiated the process by providing the first prompt, "The Ignition of Qazar Al-Zaman," based on the text "The sun does not rise over the Kingdom of QAZAR AL-ZAMAN. It ignites it." This initial prompt specifies an epic, ultra-wide establishing shot using a 16mm lens, depicting a dramatic dawn igniting the desert landscape and silhouetting QAZAR AL-ZAMAN's ancient ring-wall.
